_doc: STQ-02 category (2) — same-turn correction (clear + rewrite). Inspector, having previously recorded Zs=0.35 on circuit 3, now says 'Actually Zs on circuit three is nought point seven one.' The TOOL-call path emits clear_reading(3,measured_zs_ohm,user_correction) followed by record_reading(3,measured_zs_ohm,'0.71') in the same round; the P5 bundler collapse (see _p5_note) drops the stale clear so the tool path surfaces the REPLACEMENT READING ONLY. The canned LEGACY sse (field_clears:[]) emits the replacement reading only too, so both normalised paths converge on the corrected reading-only contract with circuits[3].measured_zs_ohm = '0.71' and no clear. Field name + clear reason use the canonical schema enums (Plan 04-07 r1 audit fix — strict:true rejects `zs` and `correction` aliases).
_requirement: STT-11 + STT-09 (same-turn correction — last-write-wins on the perTurnWrites Map; see stage6-per-turn-writes.js SHAPE LOCK comment).
_normalisation_note: normaliseExtractionResult folds legacy field_clears + bundler cleared_readings into one `clears` section. Post-P5 both paths surface an empty clears section on this value-replacement turn (legacy field_clears:[]; the tool clear is collapsed by the bundler), so the divergence check compares reading-only vs reading-only. The correction (new value) lives in the readings slot.
_p5_note: P5 (2026-07-23, marker T10 / feedback 80B+81): a same-turn clear→final-write for the SAME slot is a value REPLACEMENT — the new reading IS the correction, and surfacing a separate clear on top wipes the value on the client (the write frame lands, then the stale clear frame lands after it). The bundler now COLLAPSES the tool-path clear_reading when a same-slot write survives, so cleared_readings is empty on this turn. The legacy `field_clears` is therefore set to [] here (previously it carried the redundant clear) to keep BOTH normalised paths converged on the corrected reading-only contract. The tool-call SSE still emits clear_reading then record_reading (the real live sequence); P5 collapses it in the bundler.
transcript: Actually Zs on circuit three is nought point seven one.

sse_events_tool_call._comment: Round 1 — two tool_use blocks in one response: clear_reading then record_reading. STT-09 same-turn correction: the order matters only in so far as both write to the same Map key on perTurnWrites; last-write-wins means the final value in the bundled output is '0.71'.
